---
title: "Vehicle Mix Analysis"
---

## Overview

This page will describe how vehicle types and vehicle mix relate to traffic
exposure and collision severity.

::: {.callout-note}
Placeholder page.
:::

## Planned Content

- Vehicle-type breakdown from STATS19.
- HGV and long-vehicle exposure from traffic data.
- Severity patterns by vehicle mix.
- Planned Stage 1c vehicle-mix modelling.
